overview: Ismailia, located in northeastern Egypt along the Suez Canal, serves as a vital hub for trade and transportation. With a population of approximately 429,465, it plays a significant role in connecting Europe and Asia through maritime routes. The city's strategic position not only enhances its economic importance but also makes it a focal point for cultural exchange and development in the region.
history: Ismailia was founded in 1863 during the construction of the Suez Canal and named after Khedive Ismail Pasha. It has historically been a center of trade and a melting pot of cultures due to its location.
economy: The economy of Ismailia is primarily driven by its strategic position along the Suez Canal, facilitating shipping and trade. Key industries include agriculture, manufacturing, and tourism, with many businesses catering to both local needs and international trade.
tourism: Tourism in Ismailia attracts visitors with its beautiful waterfront along the Suez Canal, historical sites, and lush gardens. Popular attractions include the Ismailia Museum, showcasing local history, and the serene Lake Timsah, perfect for relaxation and leisure activities.

best_restaurants.name: Abou El Sid
best_restaurants.description: A popular spot for traditional Egyptian cuisine with a cozy atmosphere.

best_restaurants.name: El Shabrawy
best_restaurants.description: Known for its delicious grilled meats and local delicacies.

best_restaurants.name: Fish Market
best_restaurants.description: Offers fresh seafood dishes in a vibrant setting.

best_restaurants.name: Café Riche
best_restaurants.description: A historic café serving a variety of Egyptian and international dishes.

weather_summary: Ismailia experiences a hot desert climate with mild winters and extremely hot summers.

faqs.question: What time zone is Ismailia in?
faqs.answer: Ismailia is in the Africa/Cairo time zone.

faqs.question: Does Ismailia observe daylight saving time?
faqs.answer: No, Ismailia does not currently observe daylight saving time.

faqs.question: What is the population of Ismailia?
faqs.answer: The population of Ismailia is approximately 429,465.

faqs.question: When does sunrise typically occur in Ismailia?
faqs.answer: Sunrise in Ismailia typically occurs around 6:00 AM, varying slightly throughout the year.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Ismailia?
faqs.answer: The best time to visit Ismailia is during the cooler months from October to April.
